evals.prompt: How much is rent in Newtown?
evals.expected_output: Runs rental_prices.py with --suburb 'Newtown' and shows median weekly rents grouped by property type and bedrooms
Runs rental_prices.py with --budget 500 --type unit --bedrooms 2 and lists suburbs sorted by rent ascending
Runs rental_prices.py with --location 'Bondi' and shows nearby suburbs with rent ranges sorted by distance
